subject: Assess System A integration readiness
description: Verify preprocessing outputs meet System A requirements: (1) Feature matrix ready for Ridge/ARIMA/Prophet/LightGBM/XGBoost? (2) Missing values handled (or will models reject them)? (3) Feature scaling needed? (4) Time index deterministic? (5) Train/val/test split aligned with agent evaluation plan? (6) Uncertainty quantification ready (intervals for forecasts)? Output: system_a_readiness.md with blockers + recommendations.
activeForm: Assessing System A forecasting model readiness
